chief_complaint: A 72-year-old man presents with chest pain.
history: The patient has chest pain, with an initial presentation suggestive of acute coronary syndrome. His past history and other details are not provided.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are mentioned.
labs: ECG showed ST-segment elevation, AI-assisted ECG analysis suggested acute coronary syndrome, but angiography revealed patent coronary arteries. Further investigation found a pneumothorax.
